Something breaks. Your job is to figure out what happened, why it happened, and how to fix it fast.

Fastest correct answer wins

![Image 1: The Incident — bi-weekly production incident challenge](https://public-artifacts-135663523041-eu-west-1-an.s3.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com/game.gif)

Bi-Weekly

A new incident drops every second Monday

Timed

Speed matters, but correctness matters more

Recognized

Winners are announced on The Incident Challenge's page

## How it works

1

### Read the system

Logs, code, docs, architecture, and clues.

2

### Figure out the break

What happened, why, and how to fix it.

3

### Submit your answer

Fastest correct answer takes the win.

## This is for you if...

you like untangling messy systems

you trust evidence over instinct

you enjoy finding signal in noise

you're a f*cking great developer

## What you get

A production incident, turned into a challenge. A messy system. Incomplete signals. Real judgment.

### Logs

Read the noise

### Architecture

### Code
